/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/test_dir_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/test_hash_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/__/src/src/daemon/dir_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/__/src/src/daemon/hash.cpp.o -o run_tests  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
